title: Knit Out
notes:
A new mechanic joins the game — and it keeps you guessing.
Introducing the FLIP GATE. Each move you make flips it to one side, trapping the bobbins there. Your next move flips it right back, trapping the other side instead.
Plan your moves, and turn the gate to your favor.
Plus, we’ve added 50 BRAND NEW LEVELS built around this new challenge.
Update now and master the Flip Gate! :thread::sparkles:
